reasoning: Quinalphos (O,O-diethyl O-quinoxalin-2-yl phosphorothioate) is an organophosphorus insecticide containing a phosphorothioate ester group (P=S with three O-ester linkages), classifying it as a thiophosphate triester. It contains a quinoxaline ring system but its primary classification is driven by the phosphorothioate functionality.
